text: Professor Raffi Khatchadourian, RateMyProfessors — 4.2/5 | WOULD TAKE AGAIN: 82% | DIFFICULTY: 2.2/5. "This guy really cares about his students and wants to make sure students can get jobs in top tech companies." (CSCI335, Apr 4th, 2022)
